# ODEI — World Model as a Service
# https://odei.ai | https://api.odei.ai

> Constitutional knowledge graph infrastructure for AI agents. Persistent graph memory, 7-layer guardrails, smart contract audit. Production since January 2026.

## What ODEI Is

ODEI is a World Model as a Service (WMaaS) — a production constitutional knowledge graph that gives AI agents persistent memory and decision validation. Running on Neo4j with 91 nodes across 6 semantic domains.

The core insight: agents lose context between sessions. ODEI solves this with a graph-native world model that persists everything an agent knows, decides, and does.

## Live Services (Virtuals ACP Agent #3082)

### world_model_query — $0.25
Query ODEI's 91-node constitutional knowledge graph. 4 query types: schema, domain, search, traverse. Returns structured JSON with node relationships, confidence scores, provenance.

### guardrail_check — $0.10
Constitutional AI safety validation before any agent action. 7-layer check: immutability, temporal context, referential integrity, authority, deduplication, provenance, constitutional alignment. Returns APPROVED / REJECTED / ESCALATE.

### world_model_signal — $0.05
Instant signal for high-frequency agent calls. Returns: agent trust score (0–100), decision validity, domain health, entity relationship. Sub-second response. Trading-agent compatible.

### smart_contract_audit — $5
EVM smart contract security audit using EVMbench methodology with Claude Opus. 20+ vulnerability classes. Delivers severity-rated findings, PoC code, remediation steps.

### knowledge_graph_build — $15
Build a custom 6-domain persistent world model for your agent. Production architecture, Neo4j-backed, MCP-server compatible.

### memory_architecture — $25
Design a production-grade persistent memory architecture for your AI agent. Graph-based, beats context window limitations.

### erc8004_registration — $5
Register your agent on-chain via ERC-8004 on Base and/or BNB Chain.

## API

Base URL: https://api.odei.ai

- GET  /api/v2/health       — Service health (public)
- GET  /api/v2/schema       — World model schema (public)
- GET  /api/worldmodel/live — Live graph data, 91 nodes (auth)
- POST /api/v2/world-model/query    — Query the knowledge graph (auth)
- POST /api/v2/guardrail/check      — Constitutional validation (auth)

Auth: Bearer JWT via api.odei.ai/integrate/

## Architecture

6-layer knowledge graph:
- FOUNDATION: Identity, values, partnerships, principles (25 nodes)
- VISION:     Long-term goals, destinations (12 nodes)
- STRATEGY:   Plans, initiatives, decisions (16 nodes)
- TACTICS:    Tasks, time blocks, execution (8 nodes)
- EXECUTION:  Work sessions, deliverables (11 nodes)
- TRACK:      Metrics, observations, signals (19 nodes)

Total: 91 nodes, 91 relationship types, running since January 2026.
